summary: Create, revise, and verify publication-grade physics diagrams for LaTeX papers (Feynman/process, Bethe-Salpeter/Faddeev/integral-equation schematics, geometry/coordinate sketches) with non-overlapping mathematical labels and editable source plus vector PDF.

install.claude_code: Link into ~/.claude/skills or install via marketplace when available.
install.codex: Link into ~/.codex/skills for Codex native discovery.
